Definition: Accepted binomial used as the join key across sources (spelling variants unified via sp_alias).
Note: Printed names kept in each source's own CSV; see README aliases.

Definition: Total number of distinct cortical areas/fields identified in the species.
Note: Changizi n_areas; Finlay total_areas. Counts depend on the mapping scheme — comparable only approximately.

Definition: Total (neo)cortical SHEET surface area — the fully UNFOLDED cortical mantle including buried/sulcal cortex, i.e. NOT the exposed/pial surface only. Whole cortex (not a sub-region).
Basis: physically flattened cortex; area measured (Kaas/Krubitzer mapping studies)
Note: Finlay's "total cortical sheet area", from Kaas & Krubitzer flattening studies.

Definition: Total cortical sheet surface area (see above).
Basis: neocortex separated from white matter and manually FLATTENED; per-hemisphere total taken from paper text (piece-sum undercounts)
Note: Per-hemisphere totals from paper text (galago #1 2261, #2 1849, baboon 18577). Macaque 08-59 not flattened → no surface.

Definition: Total cortical sheet surface area (see above).
Basis: neocortex separated from white matter, manually FLATTENED, piece surfaces measured in ImageJ
Note: Reported in cm² → ×100 to mm². Two hemispheres of one specimen averaged first. Case 09-27 (baboon) EXCLUDED as duplicate of Collins.

Definition: REGIONAL sub-trait — surface area of primary motor cortex (M1) ONLY. Never pooled with whole-cortex CorticalSurface_Area.mm2 (trait_class = regional).
Note: Own column; slot for future regional surfaces (V1, prefrontal, …).
